scripts.build: npm run clean:dist && npm run build:ts && node ../../scripts/bundle-esbuild.mjs --entry=src/index.ts --outfile=proxy_engine.min.js --global-name=ProxyEngine --target=es2022 --minify
scripts.clean:ts: node --input-type=module -e "import {rmSync} from 'node:fs'; rmSync('build-ts', {recursive: true, force: true})"
scripts.clean:dist: node --input-type=module -e "import {readdirSync, rmSync} from 'node:fs'; for (const file of readdirSync('.')) if (file === 'index.js' || file.endsWith('.min.js')) rmSync(file, {force: true})"
scripts.test: npm run typecheck:test && TZ=UTC vitest run
scripts.typecheck: tsc -p tsconfig.build.json --noEmit && tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit && npm run typecheck:test
